name: codebase-memory-mcp
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        DeusData /

      codebase-memory-mcp  

    
      High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
summary: 该项目是一个高性能代码智能MCP服务器，能将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱，支持158种语言、毫秒级查询且减少99%的令牌消耗，以单一静态二进制文件运行且零依赖，值得关注。

name: Hyper-Extract
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        yifanfeng97 /

      Hyper-Extract  

    
      Transform unstructured text into structured knowledge with LLMs. Graphs, hypergraphs, and spatio-temporal extractions — with one command.
summary: Hyper-Extract 是一个利用大语言模型将非结构化文本自动转化为图、超图及时空结构化知识的工具，只需一条命令即可完成，值得关注因为它极大简化了复杂信息抽取流程。

name: LTX-2
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lightricks /

      LTX-2  

    
      Official Python inference and LoRA trainer package for the LTX-2 audio–video generative model.
summary: LTX-2 是 Lightricks 推出的官方音频-视频生成模型，支持推理和 LoRA 训练，因其在音视频联合生成领域的创新性而值得关注。

name: iroh
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        n0-computer /

      iroh  

    
      IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.
summary: Iroh 是一个用 Rust 构建的模块化网络栈，通过“拨号键”而非 IP 地址实现网络连接，值得关注因为它提供了去中心化、隐私优先的现代网络通信方案。

name: zvec
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        alibaba /

      zvec  

    
      A lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database
summary: zVec 是阿里巴巴开源的轻量级、超高速进程内向量数据库，因其极致的性能优化和低资源占用，特别适合需要高效向量检索的实时 AI 应用场景。

name: awesome-artificial-intelligence
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        owainlewis /

      awesome-artificial-intelligence  

    
      A curated list of Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses, books, video lectures and papers.
summary: 该项目是一个精选的人工智能资源列表，收录了课程、书籍、视频讲座和论文，因其全面且持续更新的高质量AI学习资料而备受关注。

name: LibreTranslate
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        LibreTranslate /

      LibreTranslate  

    
      Free and Open Source Machine Translation API. Self-hosted, offline capable and easy to setup.
summary: LibreTranslate 是一个免费开源、可自托管且支持离线运行的机器翻译 API，值得关注是因为它提供了隐私友好的翻译替代方案，无需依赖第三方云服务。

name: timesfm
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        google-research /

      timesfm  

    
      TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
summary: TimesFM 是谷歌研究团队开发的时间序列基础模型，专为时间序列预测而设计，值得关注因为它提供了强大的预训练能力，能显著提升多种场景下的预测性能。
